=== go.mod ===
module example.com/experiment

go 1.22

require github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0

=== go.sum ===
github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0 h1:NIvaJDMnrojkO2x0TxE3Vr4l/MfKOSr9P8I8cFoR2u8=
github.com/google/uuid v1.6.0/go.mod h1:TIyPZe4MgqvfeYDBFedMoGGpEw/LqOeaOT+nhxU+yHo=

=== main.go ===
package main

import (
	"log/slog"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func main() {
	store := NewOrderStore()
	handler := NewHandler(store)

	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	mux.HandleFunc("POST /orders", handler.CreateOrder)
	mux.HandleFunc("GET /orders/{id}", handler.GetOrder)

	addr := ":8080"
	slog.Info("starting server", "addr", addr)
	if err := http.ListenAndServe(addr, mux); err != nil {
		slog.Error("server failed", "err", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}
}

=== order.go ===
package main

import (
	"errors"
	"time"

	"github.com/google/uuid"
)

var (
	ErrEmptyCustomerName = errors.New("customer name must not be empty")
	ErrInvalidAmount     = errors.New("total amount must be greater than zero")
	ErrOrderNotFound     = errors.New("order not found")
)

type Order struct {
	ID           string    `json:"id"`
	CustomerName string    `json:"customer_name"`
	TotalCents   int64     `json:"total_cents"`
	CreatedAt    time.Time `json:"created_at"`
}

func NewOrder(customerName string, totalCents int64) (*Order, error) {
	if customerName == "" {
		return nil, ErrEmptyCustomerName
	}
	if totalCents <= 0 {
		return nil, ErrInvalidAmount
	}
	return &Order{
		ID:           uuid.New().String(),
		CustomerName: customerName,
		TotalCents:   totalCents,
		CreatedAt:    time.Now().UTC(),
	}, nil
}

=== store.go ===
package main

import "sync"

type OrderStore struct {
	mu     sync.RWMutex
	orders map[string]*Order
}

func NewOrderStore() *OrderStore {
	return &OrderStore{
		orders: make(map[string]*Order),
	}
}

func (s *OrderStore) Save(o *Order) {
	s.mu.Lock()
	defer s.mu.Unlock()
	s.orders[o.ID] = o
}

func (s *OrderStore) Get(id string) (*Order, error) {
	s.mu.RLock()
	defer s.mu.RUnlock()
	o, ok := s.orders[id]
	if !ok {
		return nil, ErrOrderNotFound
	}
	return o, nil
}

=== handler.go ===
package main

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
)

type Handler struct {
	store *OrderStore
}

func NewHandler(store *OrderStore) *Handler {
	return &Handler{store: store}
}

type createOrderRequest struct {
	CustomerName string `json:"customer_name"`
	TotalCents   int64  `json:"total_cents"`
}

func (h *Handler) CreateOrder(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var req createOrderRequest
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&req); err != nil {
		writeError(w, http.StatusBadRequest, "invalid request body")
		return
	}

	order, err := NewOrder(req.CustomerName, req.TotalCents)
	if err != nil {
		switch {
		case errors.Is(err, ErrEmptyCustomerName), errors.Is(err, ErrInvalidAmount):
			writeError(w, http.StatusUnprocessableEntity, err.Error())
		default:
			writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal error")
		}
		return
	}

	h.store.Save(order)
	writeJSON(w, http.StatusCreated, order)
}

func (h *Handler) GetOrder(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	id := r.PathValue("id")
	order, err := h.store.Get(id)
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, ErrOrderNotFound) {
			writeError(w, http.StatusNotFound, "order not found")
			return
		}
		writeError(w, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal error")
		return
	}
	writeJSON(w, http.StatusOK, order)
}

func writeJSON(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, v any) {
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.WriteHeader(status)
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(v)
}

func writeError(w http.ResponseWriter, status int, msg string) {
	writeJSON(w, status, map[string]string{"error": msg})
}

=== order_test.go ===
package main

import (
	"testing"
)

func TestNewOrder_valid(t *testing.T) {
	o, err := NewOrder("Alice", 1000)
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("unexpected error: %v", err)
	}
	if o.ID == "" {
		t.Error("expected non-empty ID")
	}
	if o.CustomerName != "Alice" {
		t.Errorf("got %q, want %q", o.CustomerName, "Alice")
	}
	if o.TotalCents != 1000 {
		t.Errorf("got %d, want 1000", o.TotalCents)
	}
}

func TestNewOrder_emptyName(t *testing.T) {
	_, err := NewOrder("", 1000)
	if err != ErrEmptyCustomerName {
		t.Errorf("got %v, want ErrEmptyCustomerName", err)
	}
}

func TestNewOrder_zeroAmount(t *testing.T) {
	_, err := NewOrder("Alice", 0)
	if err != ErrInvalidAmount {
		t.Errorf("got %v, want ErrInvalidAmount", err)
	}
}

func TestNewOrder_negativeAmount(t *testing.T) {
	_, err := NewOrder("Alice", -1)
	if err != ErrInvalidAmount {
		t.Errorf("got %v, want ErrInvalidAmount", err)
	}
}

=== store_test.go ===
package main

import (
	"errors"
	"testing"
)

func TestOrderStore_saveAndGet(t *testing.T) {
	s := NewOrderStore()
	o, _ := NewOrder("Bob", 500)
	s.Save(o)

	got, err := s.Get(o.ID)
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("unexpected error: %v", err)
	}
	if got.ID != o.ID {
		t.Errorf("got %q, want %q", got.ID, o.ID)
	}
}

func TestOrderStore_notFound(t *testing.T) {
	s := NewOrderStore()
	_, err := s.Get("nonexistent")
	if !errors.Is(err, ErrOrderNotFound) {
		t.Errorf("got %v, want ErrOrderNotFound", err)
	}
}

=== handler_test.go ===
package main

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"testing"
)

func newTestHandler() *Handler {
	return NewHandler(NewOrderStore())
}

func TestCreateOrder_success(t *testing.T) {
	h := newTestHandler()
	body, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]any{"customer_name": "Carol", "total_cents": 2500})
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/orders", bytes.NewReader(body))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	h.CreateOrder(w, req)

	if w.Code != http.StatusCreated {
		t.Fatalf("got %d, want %d", w.Code, http.StatusCreated)
	}
	var o Order
	if err := json.NewDecoder(w.Body).Decode(&o); err != nil {
		t.Fatalf("decode error: %v", err)
	}
	if o.ID == "" {
		t.Error("expected non-empty ID in response")
	}
}

func TestCreateOrder_emptyName(t *testing.T) {
	h := newTestHandler()
	body, _ := json.Marshal(map[string]any{"customer_name": "", "total_cents": 100})
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, "/orders", bytes.NewReader(body))
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	h.CreateOrder(w, req)

	if w.Code != http.StatusUnprocessableEntity {
		t.Fatalf("got %d, want %d", w.Code, http.StatusUnprocessableEntity)
	}
}

func TestGetOrder_found(t *testing.T) {
	store := NewOrderStore()
	o, _ := NewOrder("Dave", 750)
	store.Save(o)

	h := NewHandler(store)
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/orders/"+o.ID, nil)
	req.SetPathValue("id", o.ID)
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	h.GetOrder(w, req)

	if w.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("got %d, want %d", w.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
}

func TestGetOrder_notFound(t *testing.T) {
	h := newTestHandler()
	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/orders/missing", nil)
	req.SetPathValue("id", "missing")
	w := httptest.NewRecorder()

	h.GetOrder(w, req)

	if w.Code != http.StatusNotFound {
		t.Fatalf("got %d, want %d", w.Code, http.StatusNotFound)
	}
}
